items.title: Solana whales bet $15mln against SOL – Bears can drive it down to $40 IF…
items.whyYouShouldCare: Whale activity indicates a significant bearish sentiment, which could pressure SOL prices if selling intensifies.

items.title: SOL reclaims $72, but onchain data flags weakening momentum
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite reclaiming $72, declining on-chain metrics suggest potential challenges for SOL's upward momentum.

items.title: Aave, Solana ecosystem tokens lead crypto rebound as bitcoin steadies near $60,000
items.whyYouShouldCare: The rebound of Aave and Solana tokens highlights ecosystem resilience, potentially boosting SOL's liquidity and user engagement.
